validation_violations.description: CTA #7 (Resource / Checklist) must contain a clear offer or call to action. The email body does not clearly offer anything.

email.subject: Roof condition assessment framework — 1101 Madison St
email.body:
We created a framework that helps owners evaluate current roof condition and model the financial impact of deferred maintenance versus planned repair cycles over 10 years.

Most property managers find it clarifies whether a roof is stable or heading toward urgent work. Given 1101 Madison St's profile, it might be useful context for your asset planning.

Want me to send it over?
email.signature_line: 16 years serving commercial properties in Northern and Central New Jersey.
email.sender_title: Commercial Roofing Advisor, Garden State Commercial Roofing
